body:
## Sprint ID + Objective
- Sprint: `S08-agent-adapters-v1-continuity`
- Objective: Add deterministic programmatic invocation for Codex (primary) and Claude (secondary) with auto/manual switching and Continuity Packet v1 so the next agent resumes without rework.

## Whitelist + Budgets Used
- Whitelist used:
  - `src/**`
  - `docs/backlog/**`
  - `docs/sprints/README.md`
  - `docs/sprints/S08/**`
  - `/tmp/promptops/S08/**` (staging receipts)
- File-touch scope:
  - `src/s08/*`
  - `docs/backlog/README.md`
  - `docs/sprints/README.md`
  - `docs/sprints/S08/**`
- Budget receipts:
  - `/tmp/promptops/S08/gates/09_maintainability_budget_eval.txt`
  - `docs/sprints/S08/evidence/gates/09_maintainability_budget_eval.txt`

## AT Checklist
- [x] AT-S08-01 Manual switch
- [x] AT-S08-02 Auto switch
- [x] AT-S08-03 Deterministic handoff

## Evidence Paths
- Staging bundle: `/tmp/promptops/S08/**`
- Durable bundle: `docs/sprints/S08/evidence/**`
- Key receipts:
  - Preflight: `docs/sprints/S08/evidence/preflight/01_primary_preflight.txt`
  - Open PR protocol: `docs/sprints/S08/evidence/open_pr/00_pr_list.json`
  - Scope proof: `docs/sprints/S08/evidence/gates/08_scope_proof.txt`
  - Gates: `docs/sprints/S08/evidence/gates/10_verify_final.txt`, `docs/sprints/S08/evidence/gates/11_gates_final.txt`
  - AT TAP: `docs/sprints/S08/evidence/at/AT-S08-all-final.tap`
  - Continuity hash proof: `docs/sprints/S08/evidence/continuity_hash_proof.md`

### Key JSON receipts (excerpt)
```json
{"status":"success","switch_reason":"AUTO_SWITCH_EXHAUSTED","auto_switch_sequence":["codex","claude"]}
```
```json
{"hashes_equal":true,"first_messages_equal":true}
```

## Continuity Packet Hashing Rules Summary
- Canonical JSON serialization with stable key ordering.
- Deterministic sensitive-key redaction before hashing.
- Packet artifacts:
  - `continuity_packet.json`
  - `continuity_packet.sha256`
- Determinism proof:
  - `docs/sprints/S08/evidence/continuity/AT-S08-03_packet-a.continuity_packet.sha256`
  - `docs/sprints/S08/evidence/continuity/AT-S08-03_packet-b.continuity_packet.sha256`

## Stoplight Markers (pasted)
1. `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`
2. `/Volumes/[^/]+/Dev`
3. `gh[pousr]_ | github_pat_ | CODECOV_TOKEN=`
4. `localStorage | sessionStorage`
title: [S08] security : agent adapters v1 + continuity packet
